prerequisites: An active Track PMS (TrackHS) account with administrator access to generate API keys.
Your customer subdomain, used to build the API base URL in the form https://{customer}.trackhs.com/api (set via the customer_domain config field).
A Server API Key and its matching Secret, created from the TRACK admin (Configuration -> Company Setup -> API Keys), supplied as the api_key and api_secret fields.

authMethods.name: HTTP Basic authentication (API key and secret)
authMethods.summary: Track PMS authenticates with HTTP Basic auth: the generated key pair is sent as the username and password. Provide the Server API Key as api_key (sent as the username) and the matching Secret as api_secret (sent as the password). Both are required to authenticate against your customer subdomain.

setupSteps.title: Generate a Server API Key and Secret in TRACK
setupSteps.body: Sign in to your Track PMS (TRACK) account with an administrator and navigate to Configuration -> Company Setup -> API Keys. Click the + Server Key button to create a key, then copy the resulting API Key and Secret. Credentials are scoped to your customer instance.

setupSteps.title: Set your customer domain
setupSteps.body: Set customer_domain to your Track subdomain so the connector targets the correct multi-tenant endpoint. The Track API base URL has the form https://{customer}.trackhs.com/api, where {customer} is your company subdomain.

setupSteps.title: Provide the API credentials
setupSteps.body: Enter the Server API Key as api_key and the matching Secret as api_secret. The connector sends these as the Basic-auth username and password. Both values must be supplied correctly or authentication will fail.
